message:
feat(storage): tick 144 account cluster cx-first siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Twenty-third sibling-expansion tick. Adds 5 new storage `_with_cx`
siblings for the account-management cluster.

New siblings:
- upsert_account_with_cx (write path)
- update_account_last_used_with_cx (write path)
- delete_account_with_cx (write path)
- get_account_with_cx (read path)
- select_account_with_cx (composite — routes through
  `get_accounts_by_service_with_cx`, so the full selection flow
  honours cancellation)

Each leaf sibling does a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` then delegates.
`select_account_with_cx` additionally cx-threads its internal fetch.

Test: `storage_tick144_account_cluster_roundtrip` — upsert two
openai accounts (80% and 20%), get one back, exercise
`select_account_with_cx` (picks higher-quota account per default
5% threshold), update last_used_at, delete the low-quota account
then prove re-delete returns false. Verified via fork bypass:
491/491 storage:: tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage: 107 + 5 = 112 siblings across 140 legacy
pub async fns. 28 legacy methods still lack a sibling; account
cluster now fully covered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
